meta.description: Architecture Decision Record — captures a significant technical decision, its context and consequences

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_355125cf_9d78_4939_92a8_26176764e5c3" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "date" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "context" TEXT,
    "decision" TEXT,
    "rationale" TEXT,
    "consequences" TEXT,
    "deciders" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "superseded_by" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_355125cf_9d78_4939_92a8_26176764e5c3" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_355125cf9d784939_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
